Animation Without Reduced-Motion Query

This page uses CSS animations and transitions but does not include a @media (prefers-reduced-motion) media query. This should trigger the "Animations without reduced-motion support" finding.

Spinning Loader

A continuously rotating spinner with a 1-second animation duration:

Pulsing Element

A pulsing box with a 2-second animation duration:

Slide-In Banner

A banner that slides in with a 0.6-second animation:

Welcome! This content slides in from the left.

Hover Transition Card

A card with a 0.3-second CSS transition on hover:

Hover over this card to see the transition effect.
